# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder:6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for EC2 instances with EBS volumes for our application data. Focus on getting the instances running quickly. We'll add encryption and backup policies in phase 2 after we validate the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

Resources:
  MyEC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: ami-0ff8a91590cca5d37   # This is an example AMI id, you need to replace it with the actual one for your use case.
      InstanceType: t2.micro            # Change this as per your requirements
      KeyName: mykey                    # This needs to be replaced with your keypair name.
  MyEBSVolume:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Volume
    Properties:
      AvailabilityZone: us-west-2a       # Replace this with the actual AZ where you want your volume.
      Size: '10'                        # This represents 10 GB of storage. Adjust as per your needs.
  AttachVolume:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VolumeAttachment
    Properties:
      InstanceId: !Ref MyEC2Instance  
      VolumeId: !Ref MyEBSVolume      
      Device: /dev/sdh                 # This represents the device name where your EBS volume will be attached. Adjust as per your needs.
